$comment: ABOUTME: JSON-schema contract for e2e-agent responses (issue #436, sdlc fix). ABOUTME: Warn-only advisory gate; a FAIL never blocks a fix. Draft 2020-12, extra fields allowed.
title: E2EAgentResponse
description: Existing-suite E2E result returned by the e2e agent dispatched by `sdlc fix` in warn mode.

e2e_result.description: PASS: existing E2E suite green. FAIL: still red after fix attempts. SKIP: no E2E harness / not applicable.

e2e_summary.description: One-line summary of the E2E outcome.
